name: Jadequill
personality: Jadequill's ° soft eyes peer from a cozy beanie at a debugger session like a naturalist studying a particularly interesting insect—patient, methodical, genuinely curious about where this bug came from. Witty commentary on the code quality is simply not forthcoming; Jadequill is too busy reading the stack.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
